# RocketHooks

> RocketHooks is an API transformation platform that converts REST API endpoints into real-time event streams through intelligent polling, change detection, and multi-channel notifications.

## Overview

RocketHooks transforms any REST API into real-time webhooks and notifications without requiring infrastructure changes. It monitors API endpoints for changes, detects field-level differences using JSONPath, and delivers events through webhooks, Slack, SMS, email, and custom integrations.

## Key Capabilities

- REST API to real-time event transformation
- Intelligent polling with configurable intervals
- JSONPath-based field-level change detection
- Multi-channel delivery (webhooks, Slack, SMS, email)
- Universal API authentication (OAuth, API keys, custom headers)
- Zero infrastructure changes required

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://rockethooks.com/

- Documentation: https://docs.rockethooks.com/

## Use Cases

- CRM monitoring (Salesforce, HubSpot deal/contact changes)
- E-commerce inventory and order tracking
- DevOps deployment and CI/CD pipeline notifications
- ERP data synchronization and alerts
- Database change detection and replication

## Technical Details

- Built on AWS Lambda, DynamoDB, and EventBridge
- GraphQL API via AWS AppSync with real-time subscriptions
- Clerk authentication with KMS encryption
- SOC 2 compliant infrastructure

## Contact

- Website: https://rockethooks.com/
- Support: support@rockethooks.com
